creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
The system is a fresh jail within new FreeBSD 10.1Stable build.  Attempting to build samba41 results in the following:

--- cut
Installing /usr/staging/usr/local/man/man1/yapp.1
Installing /usr/staging/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/man/man3/Parse::Yapp.3
Installing /usr/staging/usr/local/bin/yapp
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>  Installing for p5-Parse-Yapp-1.05_1
===>  Checking if p5-Parse-Yapp already installed
===>   Registering installation for p5-Parse-Yapp-1.05_1 as automatic
pkg-static: p5-Parse-Yapp-1.05_1 conflicts with openssl-1.0.1_16 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.20/auto/Parse/Yapp/.packlist
*** Error code 70

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/p5-Parse-Yapp
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/p5-Parse-Pidl
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net/samba41
---

Unfortunately I'm no longer familiar with meta-ports.  Please note: perl5.20 is used.  We last built the complete ports tree on 17th Nov, the build server's only change was a svnlite --accept tf update /usr/ports
